title: Stink fish
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Stink fish''' were fish from [[Ruan]] mashed and used as fertilizer additives. They are sometimes exported to [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
